message:
chore: Ignore verification test outputs in git

- Add `runs/verify_evo/` to `.gitignore` to prevent committing ephemeral test artifacts from `verify_evolution.py`.

files.patch:
@@ -4,4 +4,5 @@ __pycache__/
 rustbpe/target/
 dev-ignore/
 report.md
-eval_bundle/
\ No newline at end of file
+eval_bundle/
+runs/verify_evo/
\ No newline at end of file
